name: Indian PhD Standards — UGC, AICTE, IIT Guidelines
description: Enforces Indian doctoral thesis formatting standards per UGC Minimum Standards 2022, AICTE Doctoral Guidelines, and IIT senate norms. Covers: thesis structure, chapter requirements, word count thresholds, pre-submission seminar, plagiarism below 10%, publication requirements, and certificate/declaration pages.
ethical_boundary: UGC mandates maximum 10% similarity (excluding bibliography/quotes). This skill helps researchers meet that standard through proper citation and paraphrasing — never through deceptive spinning or citation masking.

rules.description: Thesis must contain: Title Page, Declaration, Certificate, Acknowledgement, Abstract, Table of Contents, List of Figures, List of Tables, List of Abbreviations, Chapters 1-6+, References/Bibliography, Appendices, List of Publications. All mandatory sections must be present.

Maximum 10% similarity allowed per UGC (Promotion of Academic Integrity and Prevention of Plagiarism in Higher Educational Institutions) Regulations, 2018. Levels: 0-10% = Clear, 10-40% = Revision Required, >40% = Debarred.
Check if document references a pre-submission seminar/defense. UGC requires one pre-submission seminar before final submission. Flag if missing from timeline or certificate section.
UGC requires minimum 1 publication in peer-reviewed journal and 2 conference presentations. Check if resume/CV section reflects this.
Declaration must state: 'I hereby declare that the work presented in this thesis is my own original research work...' Additional statement required for AI-assisted tools used.
Certificate must attest originality, candidate's personal work, and fitness for submission. Must be signed by supervisor and head of department.
AICTE doctoral format: Times New Roman 12pt, double spacing, 1.5 inch left margin (binding), 1 inch other margins. Chapter numbering: 1, 1.1, 1.1.1. Figures numbered chapter-wise (Fig 1.1, Fig 2.1).

IITs typically require: A4 paper, 1.5 spacing, 12pt, minimum 120 pages, separate nomenclature list, synopsis (5-10 pages) before main content, publications categorized as Journal/Conference/Book Chapter.
Indian PhD thesis typically requires 6-8 chapters: Intro, Lit Review, Methodology, Results/Analysis (1-3 chapters), Discussion, Conclusion. Flag if essential chapters are missing.
UGC minimum 80,000 words for PhD thesis. Check document word count and flag if significantly below threshold.
